policy.destructive_poc_policy: request-fixture-only until the owning prompt provisions isolated disposable state
policy.red_green_rule: a finding closes only when its named regression fails on the assessed behavior and passes on the repaired behavior

confirmed.boundary: WSF verify, attenuate, seal, unseal, and exchange service entry
confirmed.red: a currently revoked token reaches any privileged service
confirmed.green: every revocation dimension denies every privileged service without restart

confirmed.boundary: SealService unseal authorization before Transit unwrap
confirmed.red: subject B unseals subject A envelope in one tenant
confirmed.green: cross-subject unseal denies unless a named delegation capability authorizes it

confirmed.boundary: attenuation lineage plus atomic budget ledger
confirmed.red: nested children obtain independent spend namespaces
confirmed.green: all descendants reserve against the immutable root lineage ceiling

confirmed.red: omitted requested_models creates an unconstrained token
confirmed.green: omission resolves to the tenant policy allowlist and cannot exceed it

confirmed.red: attenuation exceeds the tenant maximum depth
confirmed.green: maximum depth is enforced before child issuance

confirmed.red: credential expiration exceeds remaining token authority
confirmed.green: duration is the strict intersection and sub-provider-minimum authority denies

confirmed.red: missing trust mounts mutation routes without authentication
confirmed.green: production refuses before bind and later requires verified admin context

confirmed.red: plaintext unauthenticated Raft mutation transport starts in production
confirmed.green: production refuses before bind until peer mTLS and identity checks are active

confirmed.red: ordinary tenant token creates estate revocation
confirmed.green: only an explicit estate revocation capability authorizes the mutation

confirmed.boundary: AOG GET and LIST final-object authorization
confirmed.red: tenant A reads tenant B objects by name or list
confirmed.green: server filters lists and authorizes the final canonical GET object

confirmed.boundary: AOG system-scoped update and delete authorization
confirmed.red: tenant principal mutates a global object
confirmed.green: global mutation requires an estate-scoped capability

confirmed.boundary: desired-state commit and durable audit barrier
confirmed.red: mutation commits while audit receipt is lost
confirmed.green: every crash point yields no mutation or a recoverable durable audit intent

confirmed.boundary: ring revocation and Transit key destruction
confirmed.red: tenant ring action deletes estate-wide key material
confirmed.green: tenant revocation cannot reach estate key destruction without dedicated capability

confirmed.red: tenant bundle is re-signed as estate policy
confirmed.green: publication verifies authority, scope, provenance, and monotonic version

confirmed.boundary: shared gateway decision before provider dispatch
confirmed.red: any protocol surface dispatches a disallowed model
confirmed.green: all OpenAI and Anthropic surfaces enforce identical model caveats

confirmed.boundary: shared gateway decision before provider dispatch
confirmed.red: any protocol surface dispatches through a disallowed route
confirmed.green: all surfaces enforce identical route caveats

confirmed.red: parallel calls jointly exceed a token budget
confirmed.green: reserve commit release prevents every over-ceiling schedule

confirmed.boundary: router terminal decision before local or cloud dispatch
confirmed.red: explicit deny still reaches a local provider
confirmed.green: deny is terminal for every target and protocol surface

confirmed.red: production starts with revocation disabled
confirmed.green: startup and every request require a current verified revocation provider

confirmed.red: unique invalid bearer strings cause unbounded OpenBao work
confirmed.green: invalid attempts are bounded before expensive upstream authentication

confirmed.red: credential reaches a redirected host
confirmed.green: redirects are rejected and no credential leaves the configured origin

confirmed.red: arbitrary plaintext host is accepted as local
confirmed.green: production permits plaintext local egress only to loopback

confirmed.red: production accepts credentials with an HTTP base URL
confirmed.green: credentialed provider bases require HTTPS

confirmed.boundary: provider response and SSE decoder limits
confirmed.red: oversized body frame or stream consumes unbounded memory
confirmed.green: body frame line event and cumulative limits terminate safely

confirmed.red: missing or false provider usage suppresses charge
confirmed.green: local counts are authoritative and discrepancies are recorded

confirmed.red: caller-supplied provenance reaches a mutating tool
confirmed.green: server-derived verified provenance is mandatory and default-deny

confirmed.red: parallel tool calls exceed mission or blast-radius caps
confirmed.green: reserve commit release is atomic across both ceilings

confirmed.boundary: tool proxy unified success and error egress pipeline
confirmed.red: sensitive tool error text bypasses scanning
confirmed.green: success and error payloads pass through one fail-closed scanner

confirmed.red: sensitive JSON object keys survive redaction
confirmed.green: keys and values are scanned with depth size and element limits

deferred.question: Identify the production Ring-3 refresh integrator and monotonic expiry enforcement.
deferred.expected: production refresh caller and freshness check, or a documented absence

deferred.question: Identify every authorization consumer of verify output.
deferred.expected: complete call graph from verify response to authorization decisions

deferred.question: Reconcile maximum classification with issuance policy.
deferred.expected: deployed policy source and issuance comparison, or a confirmed missing check

deferred.question: Trace consumers of caller-supplied sealed placeholders.
deferred.expected: all consumers and whether each cryptographically verifies sealed state

deferred.question: Find production callers of the gateway label helper.
deferred.expected: production activation callers or proof the helper is unreachable

deferred.question: Identify privileged consumers of provider stream termination semantics.
deferred.expected: consumer list and explicit truncated-stream policy

deferred.question: Establish controller consumers and restart behavior for grant policy versions.
deferred.expected: production consumers persistence boundary and anti-rollback state

deferred.question: Trace immutable ownership of mission-derived grants.
deferred.expected: ownership scope reduction reconciliation and counter call graph

deferred.question: Establish executor guarantees for target-system metadata.
deferred.expected: all constructors and fail-closed behavior when metadata is absent

deferred.question: Validate credential cleanup and post-execution output containment.
deferred.expected: cancellation cleanup path credential TTL and bounded output framing
